mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, exercise_type, location, duration, created_at, updated_at FROM exercise_data ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT id, user_id, exercise_type, location, duration, created_at, updated_at FROM exercise_data WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE() ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exercise_data (user_id, exercise_type, location, duration, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{exerciseType}, #{location}, #{duration}, NOW(), NOW())
